text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first three years of the Twinkle Series are
behind us, and we've finally found a day to relax
and take it slow.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer, Trainer! Are you free this weekend?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but worry she wants to invite me to go
foraging for food in the mountains or at the
beach again, and brace myself for her next words.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yay! It's finally time to fulfill the promise we made
with each other, then!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Let's go on a hot spring getaway!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, on the day of our hot spring vacation...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hellooo!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! The truth is, this inn has a secret...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And that's that it has veeery buono food!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We might be here on vacation, but this is
doubling as a training excursion!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to learn about yummy foods, sharpen
my skills, and expand my repertoire of buono
recipes while I'm here! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll take this challenge on like sumo
wrestlers take on their foes! Dosukoi! Dosukoi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono's got her plans, but since there's
some time before dinner, we end up checking out
the hot spring first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh. That felt wonderful... The water was so
nice...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I understand what it feels like to be a
chicken meatball now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Speaking of which, it's almost dinnertime!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Now, settle your weight, ready your
stance... To battle!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, wooow!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
They served us appetizers, sushi, local specialties,
some stewed, steamed, and pickled dishes, and
pilaf in a pot with soup!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... They all look so luscious and yummy!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it'd be a waste to let the food get cold, so
let's eat now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Every one of these dishes is buono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
This fish is so buono even though it was just
grilled with salt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every entree has been perfectly prepared, but the
grilled dishes are particularly delicious. Every bite
melts in my mouth.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
They must have grilled everything over charcoal and
used special salt. I think it might be Camargue salt.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
What did they use to make this broth, though? Shiitake
mushrooms... and dried sardines, maybe? The veggies
are cut so beautifully too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes glitter with excitement as she murmurs
to herself while sipping and comparing broths.
The night goes on in much the same way...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm stuffed!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Inns are such great places... It's like they serve
pure joy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the shocking amount of food they gave
us, we manage to polish everything off between
the two of us.
choice_data_list: You truly love food, don't you?
You truly love food, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! I love making it, eating it, and learning
new recipes! I just love everything about food,
especially cooking!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And the more you learn about cooking, the more
your knowledge of it builds.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The fun part is seeing how everything, from
good-quality ingredients to the strength of
different seasonings, comes together to make
buono dishes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I guess you could say that the fundamentals of
cooking are all worth their weight in salt.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪ I have a theory, you know?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Everybody wants to make lots and lots of tasty
and nutritious food for the people who mean the
most to them.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I think it was through generations of carefully
passing down the desire to nourish loved ones
that gave birth to the basics of cooking.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'll always treasure the things my
parents taught me...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
As well as everything I've learned here today at
this inn.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer, you're a very important person to me...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And I hope that you'll will always be happy and
find life buono.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it amazing how happy food and cooking can
make the most important people in your life feel?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to master this grilling technique when we
get back! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Especially since you liked the grilled food so
much.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I guess it's because we've been together
so long...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But I can tell when you think something is buono,
even if you don't show it on your face! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Hishi Akebono and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
